sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SU Group Holdings Limited (SUGP) stock price, news, quote and history
feed.summary: This article provides comprehensive financial information for SU Group Holdings Limited (SUGP), including its stock price, historical data, and company overview. It details the company's operations in security-related engineering and security guarding services in Hong Kong and internationally. The data highlights recent stock performance, key financial metrics, and comparisons with similar companies in the security sector.

feed.title: DHI or NVR: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
feed.summary: This article evaluates D.R. Horton (DHI) and NVR (NVR) as potential value stock picks in the Building Products - Home Builders sector. Based on Zacks Rank, earnings outlook revisions, and various valuation metrics like P/E, PEG, and P/B ratios, DHI appears to be the superior value option with a "B" grade compared to NVR's "C" grade. Value investors may find D.R. Horton more attractive due to stronger estimate revisions and better valuation metrics.

feed.title: Bruno Mars to have street renamed after him on Las Vegas Strip
feed.summary: Bruno Mars will have Park Avenue on the Las Vegas Strip renamed "Bruno Mars Drive" in his honor. MGM Resorts International is hosting a parade and ceremony on April 10th to celebrate the renaming, which will precede the start of Mars' "The Romantic Tour" at Allegiant Stadium. This makes Mars the second performer, after Elvis Presley, to have a street connected to the Strip named after him, joining other legends recognized in Las Vegas.

feed.title: General Mills To Close St. Charles Plant In June
feed.summary: General Mills will close its St. Charles pizza crust plant in early June, resulting in 163 job losses. This closure is part of a multi-year effort to streamline the company's supply chain and consolidate capacity, which was first announced in a September 2025 SEC filing and is expected to incur approximately $82 million in restructuring charges. Local officials are working to assist affected employees with job services and resources, and plan to recruit a new manufacturer for the site.

feed.title: FDA approves expanded EYLEA HD dosing intervals
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals' EYLEA HD (aflibercept) injection 8 mg has received expanded FDA approval for extended dosing intervals in wet age-related macular degeneration (AMD) and diabetic macular edema (DME). This allows for administration up to every 20 weeks following one year of successful response, building on previous approvals. The decision is based on 96-week data from the PULSAR and PHOTON trials, demonstrating sustained efficacy and safety with extended intervals.

feed.title: Georgia Power says grid upgrades cut outages in half in some areas
feed.summary: Georgia Power has invested $1.3 billion in its Grid Investment Program over the past three years, completing 104 distribution projects in 2025 and enhancing reliability for over 504,000 customers. Areas with completed projects have seen up to a 50% reduction in both the frequency and duration of power outages. The program also helped in faster restoration efforts following severe weather events like Hurricane Helene in 2024.

feed.title: Danaher (DHR) Analyst Rating: Evercore ISI Lowers Price Target
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has maintained an "Outperform" rating for Danaher (DHR) but lowered its price target from $254.00 to $225.00, an 11.42% decrease. Despite this adjustment, the overall analyst consensus for Danaher remains positive. Danaher, specializing in scientific instruments and consumables, shows an average target price of $262.62 from 20 analysts and an "Outperform" recommendation from 26 brokerage firms.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Group Lowers Price Target for Baxter International (BAX) to $22 | BAX Stock News
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has maintained its "Outperform" rating for Baxter International (BAX) but lowered its price target from $23.00 to $22.00, a 4.35% decrease. This adjustment follows several other analysts lowering their price targets for BAX in recent months. Despite these adjustments, the average one-year price target from 15 analysts suggests a 29.18% upside from the current price, with GuruFocus estimating a fair value upside of 118.91%.

feed.title: C: Evercore ISI Group Lowers Citigroup's Price Target to $115
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has maintained an "In-Line" rating for Citigroup (C) but lowered its price target from $125 to $115. This adjustment reflects a -8.00% change in the target price, as reported by analyst Glenn Schorr. Other firms have recently given varied ratings and price targets, with an overall average brokerage recommendation of 1.9, indicating an "Outperform" status for Citigroup.

feed.title: ESS: Evercore ISI Group Lowers Price Target to $264 | ESS Stock News
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has maintained an "In-Line" rating for Essex Property Trust (ESS) but lowered its price target from $269 to $264. This adjustment reflects a 1.86% decrease and follows similar actions by other analysts. Despite the reduced price target, the average analyst target still implies an upside of 12.17% from the current stock price, and GuruFocus estimates a fair value suggesting a 16.29% upside.

feed.title: Williams Sonoma partners with Oakville Grocery for food collection
feed.summary: Williams Sonoma has announced a partnership with Oakville Grocery, a 145-year-old Napa Valley grocery and wine merchant, to create a new food collection. The collection features gourmet products and pantry items, including olive oils, tapenades, and sauces, all reflecting the flavors of the Napa and Sonoma Valleys. These products will be available at Williams Sonoma stores, online, and a curated selection will also be sold at the Oakville Grocery store.

feed.title: Jefferies Lowers Wynn Resorts Price Target to $150
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has reduced its price target for Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) from $161 to $150 but maintained a 'buy' rating, citing ongoing challenges for the casino operator. Despite the reduction, the new target still implies a substantial upside of 47.10% from the current trading price. Investors are advised to monitor the upcoming earnings report for Wynn Resorts.

feed.title: WILLIAMS SONOMA LAUNCHES COLLABORATION WITH OAKVILLE GROCERY
feed.summary: Williams Sonoma has collaborated with Oakville Grocery to launch a new collection of gourmet food and pantry staples. This partnership celebrates the Napa Valley heritage and local flavors, bringing artisanal foods and culinary traditions to customers nationwide. The new collection is available in Williams Sonoma stores and online, with in-store sampling events scheduled for April 17 and 18.

feed.title: Why Is Viridian Therapeutics Stock Sinking Monday?
feed.summary: Viridian Therapeutics (NASDAQ: VRDN) stock declined sharply following positive Phase 3 data from Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN) for TEPEZZA in thyroid eye disease (TED), intensifying competitive pressure. Viridian's own REVEAL-1 trial for elegrobart met its primary endpoint but showed weaker efficacy compared to peers, leading to investor concerns about commercial viability. Despite this, Viridian plans to submit a Biologics License Application (BLA) for elegrobart in Q1 2027 and believes its pipeline candidates veligrotug and elegrobart have significant potential in the TED market.

feed.title: Akamai Tech: Growth Isn't The Problem - Profitability Is (NASDAQ:AKAM)
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies has transitioned into a security and cloud platform, yet its organic growth is modest and largely driven by acquisitions. The company's declining profitability, marked by a narrowing gap between gross profit margin and fixed cost margin, has led to weaker returns on capital compared to its peers. Despite optimistic valuation assumptions, the article estimates Akamai's intrinsic value at $51 per share, significantly below its current market price of $117, indicating no margin of safety for investors.

feed.title: Spanish Startup Xoople Raises $130M Series B for AI-Powered Earth Mapping
feed.summary: Madrid-based startup Xoople has secured $130 million in Series B funding, led by Nazca Capital, to develop an AI-powered Earth observation satellite constellation, bringing their total funding to $225 million and achieving unicorn status. The company has partnered with L3Harris Technologies for advanced sensors designed to deliver significantly improved geospatial data. This funding round, one of Europe's largest space tech rounds in 2026, aims to support enterprise applications in government, agriculture, and supply chain management.

feed.title: 9 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Whale Activity In Today's Session
feed.summary: This article identifies nine consumer discretionary stocks that experienced significant "whale" option activity during today's trading session. It details specific call and put option sweeps for companies like Tesla, Amazon, Peloton, and Alibaba, including contract numbers, strike prices, expiration dates, and perceived sentiment (bullish, bearish, or neutral). The report serves as a tool for traders to spot potential opportunities based on large-scale options transactions.

feed.title: Cboe’s 24 Hour EDGX Plan And What It Means For Investors
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets plans to introduce 24-hour, 5-days-per-week trading for U.S. equities on its EDGX exchange, subject to regulatory approval, aiming to align with global trading hours and provide continuous access to U.S. equities. This initiative could significantly impact liquidity, order timing, and risk management, while also expanding Cboe's market presence beyond options and volatility products. Investors should consider both the potential benefits, such as deeper relationships with global brokers and increased demand for data products, and the risks, including higher operational costs and potential liquidity fragmentation in overnight sessions.

feed.title: Starbucks rises as investors weigh new U.S. barista incentive plan and pay changes
feed.summary: Starbucks (SBUX) stock rose 3.6% after the company announced a new incentive program and pay changes for its U.S. baristas, including an incentive rewards structure, expanded tipping options, and a shift to weekly pay. Investors view these initiatives as a way to improve staffing stability and service quality, which are crucial for the company's turnaround efforts. The changes are expected to increase eligible partners' compensation by 5%-8% and will begin rolling out in July 2026.

feed.title: eBay shares rise as investors focus on ad monetization momentum and recent strategic updates
feed.summary: eBay (EBAY) shares rose 3.9% today, driven by renewed optimism in its higher-margin initiatives, particularly advertising, and strong confidence in its capital-return strategy and product development. Recent strategic announcements, including the acquisition of Depop from Etsy and an expanded partnership with Klarna, coupled with supportive analyst target increases, appear to have fueled this positive market reaction.

feed.title: See Inside Royal Caribbean's Ultimate Family Treehouse on New Hero of the Seas Ship
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean International has unveiled details and renderings of the Ultimate Family Treehouse, a new accommodation type debuting on its forthcoming ship, Hero of the Seas, in August 2027. This family-focused suite will feature a private whirlpool, indoor and outdoor dining, a rooftop terrace with ocean views, and a two-deck teen room with a game room and secret hideout. The Hero of the Seas will be the cruise line's fourth Icon Class ship, offering various new cabin options for travelers.

feed.title: Eptura Named a Leader in 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Workplace Experience Applications
feed.summary: Eptura, a global worktech company, has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Workplace Experience (WEX) Applications. This acknowledgment highlights Eptura's completeness of vision and ability to execute in a market where organizations seek to deliver consistent, high-quality workplace experiences amid evolving expectations. The company's AI-backed platform aims to unify people, spaces, and operations, supporting better decision-making and reducing fragmentation across workplace tools for large enterprises.

feed.title: Eptura Named a Leader in 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Workplace Experience Applications
feed.summary: Eptura, a global worktech company, has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Workplace Experience (WEX) Applications. This acknowledgment highlights Eptura's comprehensive vision and ability to execute in an evolving workplace landscape. The company's unified, AI-backed platform helps organizations manage complex workplace environments by connecting experience signals with operational systems to improve visibility, support hybrid work, and strengthen governance.

feed.title: UBS Maintains ConocoPhillips(COP.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $155
feed.summary: UBS has reiterated its Buy rating for ConocoPhillips (COP.US), maintaining a target price of $155. This continued positive outlook from UBS suggests confidence in the company's future performance.

feed.title: News Corp (Class A) stock: What investors should know in today's media landscape
feed.summary: News Corp (Class A) is presented as a diversified media powerhouse with strong positions in news publishing, book publishing, and digital real estate services. The article highlights its resilience due to multiple revenue streams, including dominant subscription models, and strategic digital investments. Investors are encouraged to consider the stock for stable growth in a rapidly evolving media landscape, despite potential risks like regulatory scrutiny and advertising market fluctuations.

feed.title: General Mills to eliminate 163 jobs as it shutters Missouri manufacturing plant
feed.summary: General Mills will permanently close its manufacturing plant in St. Charles, Missouri, leading to the elimination of 163 jobs. The plant, which produced pizza crusts, is expected to cease operations on or about June 8. This closure was previously disclosed by the company, with formal details now provided under the Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification Act.

feed.title: Broadridge expands proxy voting solution to tokenized securities. Galaxy adopts
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions is expanding its proxy voting and disclosure platform to include tokenized securities, utilizing an Avalanche L1 blockchain. This allows issuers to manage voting for both conventional and digital securities via a single dashboard, with Galaxy being the first company to adopt this solution for its upcoming annual meeting. Galaxy's CEO, Mike Novogratz, highlighted the significance of bringing on-chain proxy voting to public companies, combining traditional market infrastructure credibility with blockchain benefits for more efficient shareholder engagement.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Customers Reminded of Options as Winter Moratorium Approaches
feed.summary: Xcel Energy is reminding customers that the annual winter moratorium on utility disconnections ends on April 15. The company is offering assistance through its new Residential Arrears Assistance Program (RAAP) and other payment options for customers who are behind on their bills. RAAP provides a one-time annual bill credit to eligible residential customers who received WHEAP assistance and still have a past-due balance.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. stock: Why it's drawing investor attention now
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD) is a pivotal player in the semiconductor industry, driven by surging AI demand and its strategic market positioning. The company's focus on innovative CPUs and GPUs for data centers and premium client segments, along with analyst upgrades, is attracting significant investor attention. While competitive pressures and valuation concerns exist, AMD's growth trajectory in the AI revolution makes it a key stock to watch for global investors.

feed.title: Important Notice to Long-Term Shareholders of BellRing Brands, Inc. (NYSE: BRBR); Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY); Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT); and Molina Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: MOH): Grabar Law Office Investigates Claims on Your Behalf
feed.summary: Grabar Law Office is investigating potential breaches of fiduciary duties by officers and directors of BellRing Brands, Inc. (BRBR), Coty Inc. (COTY), Gartner, Inc. (IT), and Molina Healthcare, Inc. (MOH). The firm is encouraging long-term shareholders who held shares before specific dates to contact them regarding potential corporate reforms, return of funds, and incentive awards, or participation in class-action lawsuits. Each investigation stems from alleged false or misleading statements and undisclosed material adverse facts concerning the companies' business, operations, and prospects.

feed.title: Sezzle Stock Price Jumps 8.3% on Monday
feed.summary: Sezzle Inc. (NASDAQ:SEZL) saw its stock price jump 8.3% on Monday, closing at $69.05 despite a significant drop in trading volume. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the buy-now, pay-later company, with an average price target of $108.33. This performance reflects both industry volatility and Sezzle's strong financial results, making it a promising investment.

feed.title: WCM Investment holds 33.74M Sea Ltd shares (SE) — 6.17% stake
feed.summary: WCM Investment Management, LLC has reported a beneficial ownership of 33,742,269 Class A ordinary shares in Sea Ltd (SE), representing a 6.17433% stake. This information was disclosed in a Schedule 13G filing with the SEC, indicating that WCM Investment Management holds sole voting and dispositive power over these shares as of March 31, 2026, with the filing signed on April 6, 2026.

feed.title: Schwab Trading Activity Index drops in March on Iran war (SCHW:NYSE)
feed.summary: The Schwab Trading Activity Index (STAX) for The Charles Schwab Corporation (SCHW) experienced its steepest monthly decline since May 2025, dropping to 56.04 in March from 57.32 in February. This decrease is attributed to concerns related to the Iran war. The STAX measures retail investor stock positions and trading activity across Schwab's client accounts.

feed.title: Bruno Mars to be honored with Strip parade, street dedication
feed.summary: Bruno Mars will be celebrated with a parade on the Las Vegas Strip and a street dedication, renaming Park Avenue to Bruno Mars Drive. The event, initiated by MGM Resorts International, precedes his "Romantic Tour" opener at Allegiant Stadium and solidifies his long-standing partnership with MGM. Mars joins other Vegas legends with street names, underscoring his significant impact on the city's entertainment scene.

feed.title: Alphabet Stock Rises Modestly as Analysts Affirm GOOG as Long-Term Buy on AI and Cloud Strength
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (GOOG) shares rose modestly as analysts reaffirmed a bullish long-term outlook, citing strength in AI and Google Cloud, despite significant planned capital expenditures for AI infrastructure in 2026. The company's strong Q4 2025 results, with notable revenue growth in Google Cloud and ongoing funding from Search advertising, support analyst price targets predicting 16% to 24% upside. While aggressive spending plans initially caused caution, experts view it as a necessary investment for competitive advantage and sustained leadership in the AI and cloud markets.

feed.title: Dogecoin (DOGE) Price Prediction: 21Shares ETF Debuts on Nasdaq While DOGE Retests Key $0.09 Support
feed.summary: This article discusses the Dogecoin (DOGE) price prediction following the debut of the 21Shares Dogecoin ETF on Nasdaq and its classification as a digital commodity. While DOGE retests key support at $0.09 and faces market headwinds, the article also highlights T4urox IO, a decentralized hedge fund protocol, as an alternative investment offering structural yield from AI agent trading profits. T4urox IO's presale is ongoing, with stakers receiving 80% of trading profits, presenting a contrasting investment model to DOGE's meme-driven momentum.

feed.title: 21Shares Launches Dogecoin (DOGE) ETF on Nasdaq as SEC and CFTC Classify DOGE as Digital Commodity
feed.summary: 21Shares has launched a Dogecoin (DOGE) ETF on Nasdaq following the SEC and CFTC's classification of DOGE as a digital commodity, providing institutional investors with regulated access. Despite this, DOGE's price remains significantly below its peak, and holders earn no direct profits from the network. In contrast, the T4urox IO decentralized hedge fund protocol, currently in its third presale phase, aims to offer stakers 80% of trading profits generated by AI agents through a risk-controlled framework.

feed.title: Best Buy Co. Inc. stock: What you should know now as consumer trends shift
feed.summary: This report analyzes Best Buy Co. Inc.'s business model, competitive advantages, and financial health to help investors determine its value amid changing retail dynamics. It highlights Best Buy's omnichannel strategy, focus on services like Geek Squad, and consistent shareholder returns through dividends and buybacks. The article also addresses key risks such as consumer demand fluctuations and intense competition, providing a balanced perspective for global investors.

feed.title: General Mills to lay off 163 workers by June 8
feed.summary: General Mills announced that it will lay off 163 workers by June 8. This decision is due to the closure of its pizza crust plant located in St. Charles. The plant closure will result in numerous job losses.

feed.title: Blue Bottle’s New Era: Inside the Under‑$400M Sale Reshaping the Global Coffee Landscape
feed.summary: Centurium Capital, the controlling shareholder of Luckin Coffee, is acquiring Blue Bottle Coffee's global café operations from Nestlé for under $400 million, a significant markdown from Nestlé's initial asking price. Nestlé will retain ownership of Blue Bottle's consumer packaged-goods business, allowing Centurium to expand its presence in the premium coffee market while Nestlé focuses on retail. This acquisition marks a significant shift in the global coffee landscape, with a Chinese conglomerate taking ownership of a renowned Western artisanal brand.

feed.title: Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) Price Target Lowered to $150.00 at Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group lowered its price target for Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) to $150.00 from $161.00 but maintained a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 47.10%. This adjustment follows Wynn missing its quarterly EPS consensus despite slightly beating revenue estimates. The casino operator currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average target price of $138.53.

feed.title: Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE:BR) Earns Buy Rating from Needham & Company LLC
feed.summary: Needham & Company LLC has reiterated a "Buy" rating for Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE:BR) with a $255 price target, suggesting a 57% upside. This follows Broadridge's strong quarterly performance, exceeding EPS and revenue estimates, and setting optimistic FY2026 guidance. Despite a mixed analyst view, the CEO recently increased his stake, indicating confidence in the company's future.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) Price Target Raised to $26.00
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has raised its price target for Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) from $24.00 to $26.00, maintaining a "hold" rating despite observed financial challenges such as missed earnings estimates, negative margins, and a high debt-to-equity ratio. Other analysts, including Morgan Stanley and Susquehanna, have also adjusted their price targets, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of $32.00. The stock recently traded at $26.58, with a market capitalization of $5.41 billion.

feed.title: Celebrate Earth Month with Kroger and Round Up at the Register for World Wildlife Fund
feed.summary: The Kroger Co. is inviting customers to celebrate Earth Month by rounding up their purchases at checkout to support the World Wildlife Fund's (WWF) conservation efforts. From April 1st to April 30th, customers can donate, and Kroger will match donations up to $50,000 to advance WWF's sustainability initiatives. This initiative is part of Kroger's Zero Hunger | Zero Waste mission, reinforcing their commitment to community health and environmental stewardship.

feed.title: General Mills plant in St. Charles to close in June
feed.summary: General Mills announced the closure of its plant in St. Charles, Missouri, effective early June, leading to 163 job eliminations. This decision follows earlier plant closure announcements in October 2025. Employees affected by this closure are not eligible for transfer or displacement to other facilities, and the closure will be permanent.

feed.title: Science Will Win season finale explores AI in cancer care with Pfizer Chief Oncology Officer Jeff Legos
feed.summary: The sixth season finale of Pfizer's "Science Will Win" podcast, which has reached 3 million downloads, focuses on the role of artificial intelligence (AI) in cancer care and research. Hosted by Dr. Raven Baxter, the episode features Pfizer Chief Oncology Officer Jeff Legos and other experts discussing how AI and digital technologies are being integrated to accelerate oncology advances and connect scientific breakthroughs with patient care. The season has explored various aspects of oncology, from early-onset cancer to survivorship and the contributions of women in the field.

feed.title: Netflix launches new gaming app for kids called Netflix Playground
feed.summary: Netflix is expanding its gaming features with a new kid-friendly app called Netflix Playground, targeting children 8 years old and younger. The app will include popular titles like "Playtime With Peppa Pig" and "Sesame Street," and all games will be playable offline with no ads, in-app purchases, or extra fees. This launch follows Netflix's recent price increase and its ongoing investment in gaming since 2021, aiming to provide a safe and engaging space for children.

feed.title: Celebrate Earth Month with Kroger and Round Up at the Register for World Wildlife Fund
feed.summary: Kroger is inviting customers to celebrate Earth Month by rounding up their purchases at checkout to support the World Wildlife Fund (WWF). The Kroger Co. Zero Hunger | Zero Waste Foundation will match customer donations up to $50,000, with funds going towards WWF's conservation and sustainability efforts. This initiative is part of Kroger's broader Zero Hunger | Zero Waste mission, which includes efforts like food rescue pilot programs and community tree plantings.

feed.title: The Mosaic Company stock: What you should know now as a smart investor
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company is a leading global producer of phosphate and potash fertilizers, essential for food production. The article details Mosaic's business model, market position, and industry drivers, highlighting its role in global food security and its vertical integration. It also covers analyst views, potential risks, and recommendations for investors considering adding MOS stock to their portfolios.

feed.title: Chlorine taste should fade as parts of New Jersey switch back
feed.summary: New Jersey American Water announced it will resume using chloramines at its Raritan-Millstone and Canal Road treatment plants the week of April 20, 2026. This follows a temporary ten-week switch to chlorine for routine maintenance, during which some customers may have noticed a chlorine taste or smell. The company has used chloramines for water disinfection since the 1970s, which meet all EPA and NJDEP drinking water standards.
